hero.title: Claude Code Plugin Marketplace
hero.description: Discover and install plugins to extend Claude Code's capabilities. Browse our collection of community-contributed plugins.
hero.headline: Explore Plugins

search.placeholder: Search by name, description, or repository...

installModal.title: Installation Instructions
installModal.description: Run these two commands in order
installModal.clipboardWarning: Your browser doesn't support automatic copying. Please copy the commands manually using Ctrl+C (Cmd+C on Mac).
installModal.tip: Tip: You can also select and copy the commands manually (Ctrl+C / Cmd+C)

alert.communityPluginsDescription: These plugins are community-contributed. Please review the source code and documentation before installation.

error.failedToLoadPluginsDescription: An error occurred: {message}. Please try refreshing the page.
error.pluginNotFoundDescription: The plugin "{name}" could not be found. It may have been removed or the link may be incorrect.
error.navigationIssueDescription: The plugin "{name}" was found but could not be displayed. Try refreshing the page.
error.copyFailedDescription: Could not copy to clipboard. Please copy the command manually.
error.copyAllFailedDescription: Could not copy commands to clipboard. Please copy them manually from above.

empty.noPluginsMatchQuery: No plugins match your search query: '{query}'

seo.title: Claude Code Plugin Marketplace
